name: UBoat the Arcade Mod
description:
Transform UBOAT into a high-octane arcade experience inspired by classic U-Boat sims like Das Boot!

FAST-PACED GAMEPLAY: Torpedo reload 1 sec | Navigation instant | No ammo costs | Unlimited fuel and supplies | Zero food consumption

ARCADE COMBAT: All torpedoes 50 damage, 0% duds, 40km range | Artillery 0.1s reload, extreme range | All ammo massively buffed | AA weapons are highly effective vs ships

NO GRINDING: Crew discipline 0 loss | Hunger no penalties | Oxygen generation very high | Electricity recharges instantly | Diseases heal quickly

INSTANT UPGRADES: Research tasks 1 day (vs 5-16) | Equipment transfer instant | Ship upgrades instant

STEALTH MASTERS: Engine noise 0 | Fuel usage 0 | Diving enhanced | Sonar and sight massively increased

Perfect for arcade action fans tired of grinding. Pure submarine combat!

Supports UBOAT 2026.1 (Distant Coasts DLC with Type IX U-boats)
